creator: john.wolfe@broadcom.com
text:
Open-vm-tools 11.1.5 has been released.

Please see:

    https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/releases/tag/stable-11.1.5

    https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/releases/download/stable-11.1.5/open-vm-tools-11.1.5-16724464.tar.gz

    https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/tree/stable-11.1.5

This update contains fixes for several issues caught by Coverity and some issues reported to https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/issues
